meaning: v.退还,偿还n.归还,偿还额,退款
examples: We will refund you your money in full.
Ask for a refund if the goods are faulty.
We insisted on a refund of the full amount.
ChangeYourFlight provides an alternative for these non-refundable tickets, with airlines providing a partial refund without any change fee.
Yet a change in its refund procedures has many of its most loyal riders (including your correspondent) seething.
